INVOICE

Apex Builders LLC
312 Mountain View Rd
Black Mountain, NC 28711
tony@apexbuilders.net
828-555-0142

Bill to:
Summit Ridge Apartments
2450 Ridgeway Dr
Asheville, NC 28801

Invoice no.: ABL-2025-0112
Terms: Due on receipt
Invoice date: 06/19/2025
Due date: 06/19/2025
PO #: SRA001

Description                                              Qty    Rate        Amount

1. PRESSURE WASH                                                           $10,200.00
   Pressure wash 4 entire buildings (four stories high)
   Install chemicals for all stone, hardy plank, regular
   siding, soffit and fascia including porch and ceilings
   Special use of chemicals for pressure wash on metal wall

2. EXTERIOR GROUNDS                                                           $800.00
   Pressure wash sidewalks, pool deck, curbs,
   amenity areas and retaining walls

                                                          Total:  $11,000.00

Note: Please review your invoice. Thank you for your business!
